---
title: "Era vs Occurrence: Understanding Cohort Design Patterns"
output: rmarkdown::html_vignette
vignette: >
  %\VignetteIndexEntry{Era vs Occurrence: Understanding Cohort Design Patterns}
  %\VignetteEngine{knitr::rmarkdown}
  %\VignetteEncoding{UTF-8}
---

```{r, include = FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  collapse = TRUE,
  comment = "#>"
)
```

## Overview

_Add overview of cohort design patterns here..._

## Era Pattern

_Add explanation of era pattern here..._

## Occurrence Pattern (Historical)

_Add explanation of why occurrence pattern was removed..._

## Why We Chose Era-Only

_Add rationale for removing occurrence mode..._

## Migration Guide

_Add migration guide for users upgrading from versions that supported occurrence mode..._

## Further Reading

_Add links to additional resources..._
